snippet.title: Terminator 7 (2026) | Arnold Schwarzenegger, John Cena | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#terminator #arnoldschwarzenegger #johncena 

Watch This Fan-Made Terminator 7 Concept Trailer

In the world after Skynet wins the war, there are still some humans alive who refuse to give up. Those humans live in underground bunkers in the burnt out remains of civilization and a new enemy has risen from those ashes. John Cena as the TX, half human nightmare, commands an endless supply of chrome soldiers through the desolate wasteland of a ruined civilization. Anne Hathaway leads the human resistance into battle with her worn down spirit, while Jake Gyllenhaal rushes against the clock to find a way to use Skynets own weapons against it. Never before has the fight for tomorrow been so desperate or brutal.

Below the desert sands, a legend stirs. Arnold Schwarzenegger comes back as the T-800, the aging machine has spent decades dormant, but he is still just as unstopable as ever, even when his torn flesh shows off his gleaming metal endoskeleton. With leather jacket on his back, shotgun at the ready, and a Harley rumbling below him, the legendary machine heads alone to a collision that will shake the very foundations of the future. When the two titans of steel and fury collide on the battlefield, only one truth will remain. "There is no fate but what we create," and this time the fate of all humanity rests on the shoulders of a guardian that has never stopped fighting.

snippet.title: Haddaway - What is Love (NDR Talk Show, 23rd April, 1993)
snippet.description:
Haddaway performing „What is Love“ at 'NDR Talk Show' in 1993.

℗ Norddeutscher Rundfunk 1993

Available on all streaming platforms: https://album.link/jkwjgxf6gf6hm

Haddaway's musical career started in 1993 with the dance hit """"What Is Love"""", which quickly became a standard popular request - and still is today - in every club, both here and abroad. 
Twice winner of the Echo prize, and, with sales of 28 million, the owner of numerous platinum, gold and silver records, Haddaway is one of the pop music world's global players. 
There were more chart hits during the following years, including ""Life"", ""I Miss You"", ""Rock My Heart"" and ""Fly Away"".

#Haddaway #WhatIsLove

snippet.title: Babydoll
snippet.description:
8 years ago I made a tape in florida in a room a friend let me live in while I was on house arrest. I didn’t think about making the songs everyday it was more like eating or something I’d do in between living. In front of me everyday was a black epiphone, my laptop and the window overlooking the parking lot to keep an eye out for my P.O. 

Life at this time was fairly tumultuous and I felt like a heavy burden on everyone I interacted with, especially women. I just hated being poor so much. Looking back now that time ends up meaning the most. Before algorithms before other peoples words- even hearing from people I admire. Everything that comes after only makes it harder. So don’t think you’re missing something to chase what you want. It’s probably already there.

Thankful for everyone on this journey. Everyone listening to old songs and new. This one has only gotten more special to me .

dominicfike.com
